code:
from dataclasses import dataclass

@dataclass
class Triple:
    subject: str
    predicate: str
    object: str

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START

def predict(triples: list[Triple]) -> str:
    """
    Convert a list of triples about an athlete (or related entities) into a single fluent sentence.
    """
    # Simple phrase mapping for better readability; fall back to a generic pattern.
    # Helper to strip surrounding quotes and whitespace from objects
    def _clean_obj(o: str) -> str:
        return o.strip().strip('"').strip("'")

    phrase_map = {
        "league": lambda s, o: f"{s} plays in the {_clean_obj(o)} league",
        "manager": lambda s, o: f"{s} is managed by {_clean_obj(o)}",
        "position": lambda s, o: f"{s} plays as a {_clean_obj(o).lower()}",
        "ground": lambda s, o: f"{s}'s ground is {_clean_obj(o)}",
        "birthDate": lambda s, o: f"{s} was born on {_clean_obj(o)}",
        "birthPlace": lambda s, o: f"{s} was born in {_clean_obj(o)}",
        "birthYear": lambda s, o: f"{s} was born in {_clean_obj(o)}",
        "club": lambda s, o: f"{s} plays for {_clean_obj(o)}",
        "draftTeam": lambda s, o: f"{s} was drafted by {_clean_obj(o)}",
        "height": lambda s, o: f"{s} is {_clean_obj(o)} metres tall",
        "weight": lambda s, o: f"{s} weighs {_clean_obj(o)}",
        "deathPlace": lambda s, o: f"{s} died in {_clean_obj(o)}",
        "activeYearsStartYear": lambda s, o: f"{s} started his active years in {_clean_obj(o)}",
        "currentteam": lambda s, o: f"{s} currently plays for {_clean_obj(o)}",
        "currentclub": lambda s, o: f"{s} currently plays for {_clean_obj(o)}",
        "debutTeam": lambda s, o: f"{s} made his debut for {_clean_obj(o)}",
        "draftPick": lambda s, o: f"{s} was picked at {_clean_obj(o)}",
        "draftRound": lambda s, o: f"{s} was drafted in round {_clean_obj(o)}",
        "formerTeam": lambda s, o: f"{s} formerly played for {_clean_obj(o)}",
        # Improved phrasing for player number
        "playerNumber": lambda s, o: f\"{_clean_obj(s)}'s player number is {_clean_obj(o)}\",
        "college": lambda s, o: f\"{_clean_obj(s)} attended {_clean_obj(o)}\",
        "draftYear": lambda s, o: f\"{_clean_obj(s)} was drafted in {_clean_obj(o)}\",
        "coach": lambda s, o: f\"{_clean_obj(s)} is coached by {_clean_obj(o)}\",
        # Owner phrasing inverted for natural language
        "owner": lambda s, o: f\"{_clean_obj(o)} owns {_clean_obj(s)}\",
        "city": lambda s, o: f\"{_clean_obj(s)} is based in {_clean_obj(o)}\",
        "leader": lambda s, o: f\"{_clean_obj(o)} is the leader of {_clean_obj(s)}\",
        "anthem": lambda s, o: f\"The anthem of {_clean_obj(s)} is {_clean_obj(o)}\",
        "ethnicGroup": lambda s, o: f\"{_clean_obj(s)} has ethnic group {_clean_obj(o)}\",
        "language": lambda s, o: f\"The language of {_clean_obj(s)} is {_clean_obj(o)}\",
        "generalManager": lambda s, o: f\"The general manager of {_clean_obj(s)} is {_clean_obj(o)}\",
        "chairman": lambda s, o: f\"The chairman of {_clean_obj(s)} is {_clean_obj(o)}\",
        "season": lambda s, o: f\"The season for {_clean_obj(s)} is {_clean_obj(o)}\",
        "currency": lambda s, o: f\"The currency of {_clean_obj(s)} is {_clean_obj(o)}\",
        "demonym": lambda s, o: f\"The demonym of {_clean_obj(s)} is {_clean_obj(o)}\",
        "officialLanguage": lambda s, o: f\"The official language of {_clean_obj(s)} is {_clean_obj(o)}\",
        "stadium": lambda s, o: f\"The stadium of {_clean_obj(s)} is {_clean_obj(o)}\",
        "universityTeam": lambda s, o: f\"The university team of {_clean_obj(s)} is {_clean_obj(o)}\",
        "mostChampions": lambda s, o: f\"The team with most championships in {_clean_obj(s)} is {_clean_obj(o)}\",
        "leaderTitle": lambda s, o: f\"The leader title of {_clean_obj(s)} is {_clean_obj(o)}\",
        "isPartOf": lambda s, o: f\"{_clean_obj(s)} is part of {_clean_obj(o)}\",
        "country": lambda s, o: f\"{_clean_obj(s)} is in {_clean_obj(o)}\",
        "utcOffset": lambda s, o: f\"The UTC offset of {_clean_obj(s)} is {_clean_obj(o)}\",
        "timeZone": lambda s, o: f\"The time zone of {_clean_obj(s)} is {_clean_obj(o)}\",
        "areaTotal": lambda s, o: f\"The total area of {_clean_obj(s)} is {_clean_obj(o)}\",
        "foundingDate": lambda s, o: f\"{_clean_obj(s)} was founded on {_clean_obj(o)}\",
    }

    # Group objects by (subject, predicate) to allow aggregation (e.g., multiple clubs)
    agg = {}
    for t in triples:
        key = (t.subject, t.predicate)
        agg.setdefault(key, []).append(t.object)

    def make_agg_phrase(subject: str, predicate: str, objects: list[str]) -> str:
        # join multiple objects with commas and 'and' for the last one
        if len(objects) == 1:
            obj_str = objects[0]
        else:
            obj_str = ", ".join(objects[:-1]) + " and " + objects[-1]

        func = phrase_map.get(predicate)
        if func:
            # For predicates where order matters (e.g., ground), the original mapping already expects (s,o)
            # but when we have multiple objects we need a custom wording.
            if predicate in {"club", "formerTeam", "currentteam", "currentclub"}:
                return f"{subject} plays for {obj_str}"
            if predicate == "debutTeam":
                return f"{subject}'s debut team was {obj_str}"
            # default mapping works for single or multiple objects (will repeat the pattern)
            return func(subject, obj_str)
        # generic fallback
        return f"{subject} {predicate} {obj_str}"

    # Build phrases for each aggregated key
    phrases = [make_agg_phrase(s, p, olist) for (s, p), olist in agg.items()]

    # Join phrases into a single fluent sentence
    if not phrases:
        return ""
    if len(phrases) == 1:
        sentence = phrases[0]
    else:
        sentence = ", ".join(phrases[:-1]) + ", and " + phrases[-1]

    # Ensure proper punctuation and capitalization
    sentence = sentence.strip()
    if not sentence.endswith("."):
        sentence += "."
    return sentence[0].upper() + sentence[1:]

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END
